title: senna angustifolia
intro: Senna angustifolia, also known as Cavycormia sennae, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna angustifolia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and support liver health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
